description: Page 54 control probe where the same crowded page offers both a part-boundary split after a parenthetical and a sentence-boundary split after a short first sentence.
final_draft_notes: Question: in the original page-54 context, does Final Draft split at the part boundary after the parenthetical or after the first short sentence once both are legal options?
Answer: It pulls the whole block up because the whole block is now short enough to fit.
